name: 01_widget_core
purpose: Widget core: zzwUI base + Button/Label/Panel/CheckBox/TextInput/Slider/ListBox/ProgressBar/ImageView/Canvas — fields, methods, layouts, event hooks.

name: 02_renderer
purpose: ZzwRenderer: theme dictionary, font, clip stack push/pop, measureText fallback, drawArrow direction selection, drawCheckMark, drawScrollbar, drawShadow.

name: 03_window
purpose: ZzwWindow: init, setSize/setTitle/setBgColor, addWidget, setRootWidget, getWidth/getHeight, isRunning, on_close/on_resize assignment, render with empty children.

name: 04_native
purpose: Native GUI bridge: native_create_window/show/hide, set_window_size/title, get_window_size, drawing primitive callability, color utilities, parse_color, color_to_hex, lerp_color.

name: 05_layout_stress
purpose: Layout stress: 20-child vbox/hbox, nested panels, mixed layout tree, deep hierarchy of 5 levels, remove/re-add during layout.

name: 06_event_dispatch
purpose: Event hook dispatch: Button.click() invokes onClick; CheckBox.toggle() invokes onChange; widget tree event bubbling via onClick; re-entrancy safe.

name: 07_widget_tree
purpose: Widget tree operations: build a 4-deep tree of mixed types, verify parent chain, child index, get_child_at OOB, contains(px,py) for hierarchy, mass add/remove cycle.

name: 08_primitives
purpose: Drawing primitives coverage: fillRect, drawRect, fillRoundedRect, drawLine, fillCircle, drawCircle, drawText default font size, drawTextCentered, measureText, drawImage, drawPolygon via drawArrow.

name: 09_style
purpose: Styling: inline_styles dict CRUD via set/get, classes list accumulation, get_inline_style default, opacity/rotation/scale setters, set_tooltip, set_focus, add_class.

name: 10_state_machines
purpose: State-machine widgets: Button.is_toggle + click/release cycles; CheckBox.toggle parity; Slider clamp boundaries; ProgressBar get_percent edge (max=0); TextInput append/backspace/clear combo.

name: 11_collections
purpose: Collection-bearing widgets: ListBox add/remove/get/select/clear; ListBox set_selected OOB; ListBox multi_select; per-item rendering list iteration; empty-state queries.

name: 12_text_input
purpose: TextInput lifecycle: placeholder, value, max_length, password flag, append/backspace round-trip, clear, set/get value identity, unicode/empty boundary.

name: 13_renderer_clip
purpose: Clip stack: pushClip/popClip single, push/pop push/pop, popClip on empty, nested clip with theme rect, native_set_clip/native_clear_clip callability.

name: 14_perf
purpose: Performance: create 200 widgets, build a 3-level deep tree, iterate children 200 times, list ops on 100 items, repeated layout do_layout cycle, dict-style access 200 times.
